notes: The recursive extension v-hat: WFF -> B of a base assignment v (def:truth-assignment) over formulas (def:well-formed-formula). Its well-definedness is a textbook Rule-4 case: the recursion is justified by thm:structural-recursion, which in turn needs unique readability (thm:unique-decomposition). All four load-bearing and present -- a clean well-definedness dependency on theorems.
